474.reason: [This condition is flawed: it accesses tokens beyond current index without checking bounds, and the logic for distinguishing declarations from function definitions is incorrect. Function definitions start with FuncType (void/int/char) followed by Ident '(', but this checks for MAINTK and LPARENT at i+1 and i+2 which doesn't properly identify function definitions.]

478.reason: [This condition is also flawed: it only checks if the next token is MAINTK, but function definitions don't necessarily end right before main. Also accesses i+1 without bounds checking, which can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when parsing programs that end with main function.]
